title: Swachhata Pakhwada, 2026 organised by Department of Legal Affairs with enthusiastic participation from officers and staff, reinforcing the spirit of collective responsibility towards maintaining cleanliness in workplaces and beyond
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Law and Justice

Swachhata Pakhwada, 2026 organised by Department of Legal Affairs with enthusiastic participation from officers and staff, reinforcing the spirit of collective responsibility towards maintaining cleanliness in workplaces and beyond

Posted On:
03 APR 2026 3:49PM by PIB Delhi

As part of the ongoing
Swachhata Pakhwada 2026
, the Department of Legal Affairs, Ministry of Law & Justice, organized a series of activities to promote cleanliness, hygiene, and public awareness among officers and staff.

The observance commenced with a
Mass Swachhata Pledge
 and rendition of the
Swachhata Bharat Anthem
 at the Conference Room in Shastri Bhawan, reaffirming the commitment of participants towards the vision of a clean and healthy India. Dr. Rajiv Mani, Secretary, Department of Legal Affairs, administered the pledge to officers and staff members of the Department on 02.04.2026.

A
Signature Campaign
 was conducted at office premises and thereby encouraging employees and visitors to actively support the Swachhata initiative and driving the quintessential message of
Swachh Bharat Abhiyan
.

To foster greater engagement and awareness, a
Selfie Booth
 was set up at the same locations, enabling participants to share their support for cleanliness drives through creative expressions.

Additionally, a
Rangoli Activity
 was also organized showcasing artistic representations of cleanliness and environmental consciousness.

These activities witnessed enthusiastic participation from officers and staff, reinforcing the spirit of collective responsibility towards maintaining cleanliness in workplaces and beyond.

The Department of Legal Affairs remains committed to furthering the objectives of Swachh Bharat Abhiyan through sustained awareness and active participation.



********

SAMRAT

(Release ID: 2248797)

Visitor Counter : 143
